final:
module register_16bit (
    input wire reset_clk,
    input wire rst,
    input wire en,
    input wire [15:0] data_in,
    output reg [15:0] data_out
);

    always @(posedge reset_clk or posedge rst) begin
        if (rst) begin
            data_out <= 16'b0;
        end else if (en) begin
            data_out <= data_in;
        end
    end

endmodule
